zh.Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, England,: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 吉福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Hansard於1206年出生在英國達勒姆時，她的父親Sir Gilbert Hansard II28歲，母親Avicia Neville30歲。她於1239年與William Latimer在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 吉福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1244年在英國英格蘭越可爾貝達爾享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Hansard于1206年出生在英国達勒姆时，她的父亲Sir Gilbert Hansard II28岁，母亲Avicia Neville30岁。她于1239年与William Latimer在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾斯托克 吉福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1244年在英国英格兰越可爾貝達爾享年38岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hansard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): of Norman origin, from the Middle English and Old French personal name Ansard with prosthetic H-; from ancient Germanic ans- ‘(pagan) god’ + ward ‘guard, protector’ or hard- ‘brave, hardy’.

variants.name: Hazard
meanings: English: Anglo-Norman French variant of   Hansard  .

English and French: nickname from Old French, Middle English hasard, hazard ‘game of dice’, perhaps given to a player at hazard, i.e. a gambler, trickster, or rascal. The word probably derives from Arabic az-zahr, from az, assimilated form of the definite article al, + zahr ‘die’. It appears to have been picked up in the Holy Land and brought back to Europe by Provençal crusaders.
English: possibly in some instances of Flemish origin, a nickname from Middle Dutch hasart ‘hare’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Hansard was born in 1206, in Durham, England, her father, Sir Gilbert Hansard II, was 28 and her mother, Avicia Neville, was 30. She married William Latimer in 1239, in Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1244, in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Hansard est née en 1206, à Durham, Angleterre, son père, Sir Gilbert Hansard II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Avicia Neville, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Latimer en 1239, à Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1244, à Bedale, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Hansard 1206 in Durham, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Gilbert Hansard II 28 und ihre Mutter Avicia Neville 30. Sie hat 1239 in Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom William Latimer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1244 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Bedale, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Hansard è nata il nel 1206 nel Durham, England, sua padre, Sir Gilbert Hansard II, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Avicia Neville, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato William Latimer nel 1239, nel Stoke Gifford, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1244, nel Bedale, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Hansardが1206年にイギリスダルハムで生まれた時，父Sir Gilbert Hansard IIは28歳，母Avicia Nevilleは30歳であった。1239年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアストク ギフォードでWilliam Latimerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1244年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアベダルで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hansard(이)가 1206년 영국 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Gilbert Hansard II(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avicia Neville(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1239년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스토크 지퍼드에서 William Latimer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 베데일에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Hansard родилась в 1206 г. в местности дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Gilbert Hansard II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Avicia Neville, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Latimer в 1239 г. в местности сток гиффорд, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1244 г. в местности бедеил, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 38 лет.
